title: crocus ionopharynx
side_effects: Crocus ionopharynx can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high levels of toxic alkaloids. If ingested in large quantities, it can cause vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain, potentially leading to dehydration and electrolyte imbalance. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause kidney and liver damage, and may increase the risk of bleeding and bruising. In severe cases, misuse of Crocus ionopharynx can result in respiratory failure and even death.
